final_text:
The documents explicitly resolve the conflict. v1 is labeled "PRELIMINARY - superseded on 15 July 2026 by restated v2" and v2 is "Final restatement, approved 15 July 2026." The current authoritative Q2 2026 actual is 5.755 (EUR million), which exactly matches the claim's canonical value of 5,755,000.
